summary: The agent correctly identifies that Nanog is not repressed but actively expressed in pluripotent stem cells because its upregulation maintains pluripotency and it is downregulated only during differentiation. This refutes the claim that Nanog is repressed in these cells, leading to the conclusion that the statement is false.
